top_signals.title: AMD to invest $10 billion in Taiwan's AI industry to advance top-end chips
top_signals.summary: AMD's investments will focus on partnerships with companies to "advance" chip packaging and manufacturing required for next-generation AI infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India Seeks Information from Capital Group in Front-Running Case
top_signals.summary: India’s market regulator has sought information from Capital Group about trades by its entities in the local stock market that were flagged in a front-running case in early 2025, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_signals.title: Fed seeks input on expanding master account access following Trump’s executive order
top_signals.summary: Trump signed an order on Tuesday requesting the Fed to review and update regulations to integrate digital assets into traditional systems.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley issues China-only iPhones to its Hong Kong bankers - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Morgan Stanley issues China-only iPhones to its Hong Kong bankers  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
